title: Custom Capes
description: Allows players to upload their own capes and see them in game.
body:
# Custom Capes

This mod lets you use and upload custom cape textures and see them in-game, without going out to the browser.

## Usage

To open the Cape Customization menu, go to settings, then open Skin Customization, and then click Cape Settings.

### Syncing Capes from other cape services

To get capes from other cape services, click the blue arrow which will add capes that you have. Currently this will only get capes from Optifine and add them to your capes.

### Adding Capes

Open the Cape Customization menu, and drag-and-drop a cape texture, which you can make yourself or download an already made one.

### Editing Capes

You can edit the name and description of the cape you uploaded by clicking the Edit button next to the cape, after you edited the input fields, press Done. That will update the cape name and description.

### Deleting Capes

To delete a cape you have to press the X button on the cape which you uploaded.

### Displaying Capes

To show a cape, simply click a cape you uploaded in the Cape Customization menu, this will show the cape. To go back to the default cape, click the Vanilla Cape.

### Hiding/Showing other players capes (available before version 1.0.4)

To hide or show a player's cape, open the Social Interactions menu, and click the red or green button on the player, this will hide or show the player's cape, click it again to reverse the action.

## Other Info

All players using this mod will be able to see capes you are currently using through this mod.

This mod does not support non-premium accounts, and it is not going to.

You can use this mod in modpacks.
